name: Feedback summary
goal: Render aggregated feedback statistics from an ancestor ce-feedback-sink as plain HTML stat cells with no internal-component dependency.
description: Read-only dashboard panel. On connect, walks up to find the nearest ce-feedback-sink, pulls its current state, and (when live) listens to ce-feedback-state events to re-render. Sections are selected via the show attribute (any of: counts, avg, top-liked, top-disliked, distribution). top-n caps the top-N lists; live=false freezes after the initial render. Plain HTML output keyed off --ce-* tokens — does not depend on ce-kpi or any other internal component, keeping the feedback set zero-internal-dep.

props.name: subject
props.description: Optional override; defaults to the ancestor sink's subject.

props.name: show
props.description: Space-separated list of sections to render (counts | avg | top-liked | top-disliked | distribution).

props.name: live
props.description: When true, listens to ce-feedback-state events and re-renders.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-dim
cssVariables.description: Section title and label color; falls back to --ce-muted.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bg-elevated
cssVariables.description: Section card background; falls back to --ce-surface-2.

cssVariables.name: --ce-radius-md
cssVariables.description: Section card radius; falls back to --ce-radius-sm.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Card padding x + outer margin + section gap.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-lg
cssVariables.description: Count number font size; falls back to 18px.

cssVariables.name: --ce-gold
cssVariables.description: Average rating + distribution bar color; falls back to --ce-color-amber.

a11y.notes: Read-only stat panel; titles + labels carry semantic text. No interactive controls.
